docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY CASTILLO, JULIO AS TO DEFENDANT ORTEGA, TINO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED FEB-01-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORTEGA, TINO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-17-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

RETURNED MAIL SENT TO DEFENDANT OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
